description: Connect to SurveyMonkey to sync surveys, responses, collectors, contacts, and contact lists via the SurveyMonkey API v3.

install_fields.label: Client ID
install_fields.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from the SurveyMonkey Developer Portal.

install_fields.label: Client Secret
install_fields.description: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from the SurveyMonkey Developer Portal.

install_fields.label: Redirect URI
install_fields.description: The callback URL registered in your SurveyMonkey app settings.
